accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details verifiable in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies prohibition of Russian low-enriched uranium imports.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendment to USEC Privatization Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately covers DOE national security exception, non-uranium isotopes, and waiver conditions.

effective_dates.why: States 90-day effective date, waiver termination Jan 1 2028, and Dec 31 2040 sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers ban, exceptions, waiver, annual quantity limits, and congressional notification.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names all secretaries and the USEC Privatization Act.

correct_figures.why: Annual kilogram caps and dates are accurate.
